headline: Man's 'No Drama' Relationship Ended Because He Created Drama About Not Having Drama
summary: 'We never fight,' Jake said dramatically. 'That's the problem,' his girlfriend said. She left. He's still confused.
fullBody: Jake NoDrama ended his relationship by insisting it was 'drama-free.' 'We never argue,' Jake said, arguing. 'That's not healthy,' his girlfriend said. 'Why are you creating drama?' Jake asked, dramatically. She left. Jake has started a podcast called 'No Drama Zone.' Episode 1: 'Why Everyone Else Is The Problem.' The comments are dramatic. Jake is 'confused.' The drama continues.
